context: Checkpoint 2026-06-27. WIT/component distribution now has a build-free preflight for reference-driver publication planning.
current_tasks: scripts/validate-packages.mjs now checks the refarm:agent-tools and refarm:plugin component mappings without compiling Rust or running JCO.
The preflight verifies Cargo component metadata, WIT package/world names, and the expected imports/exports for agent-tools-provider and refarm-plugin-host.
Validation passed: node --test scripts/ci/test-validate-packages-lib.mjs, node scripts/validate-packages.mjs, git diff --check, after-edit, commit, and after-commit.
next_actions: Use validate-packages as the cheap first signal before any npm/crate publication work touches WIT/component packages.
Keep @refarm.dev/pi-agent private until plugin artifact policy and daily-driver gate justify a package candidate.
Next publication slice should decide whether refarm-plugin-wit needs an explicit crate/package release surface or remains an internal canonical WIT crate for now.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
